'''Kyle Wood''' (born 18 June 1989) is an English former [[rugby league]] footballer who last played as a {{rlp|hk}} for [[Sheffield Eagles]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

He has played for [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] in [[2008 National League Two]] and the [[Sheffield Eagles]] in the [[2009 RFL Championship|Championship]]. Wood then played for the [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]], spending time on loan from [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]] at the [[Batley Bulldogs]] and [[Sheffield Eagles|Sheffield]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]], and the [[Castleford Tigers]] in the Super League. He moved to the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] in the top flight, before returning to the [[Huddersfield Giants|Giants]] in the Super League.<ref>{{cite news|title=Huddersfield Giants snap up Sheffield Eagles star Kyle Wood|author=Chris Roberts|newspaper=Huddersfield Examiner|date=13 October 2009|url=http://www.examiner.co.uk/huddersfield-giants/huddersfield-giants-news/2009/10/13/huddersfield-giants-snap-up-sheffield-eagles-star-kyle-wood-86081-24912661/|accessdate=3 July 2010}}</ref> Earlier in his career he played as a {{rlp|sh}}.

==Background==
Wood was born in [[Castleford]], [[West Yorkshire|West Yorkshire, England]].{{citation needed|date=February 2020}}

==Career==
While with the Huddersfield Giants, Kyle was on a dual-contract with the [[Batley Bulldogs]].{{Citation needed|date=July 2010}}

===Halifax Panthers===
On 9 November 2021, it was reported that he had signed for [[Halifax Panthers|Halifax]] in the [[RFL Championship]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=9 Nov 2021|accessdate=24 Dec 2021|title=Halifax make another eye-catching capture|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/halifax-make-another-eye-catching-capture/}}</ref>
